channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: U.S. destroys alleged drug boat in Pacific, killing 2 more people
item.description: At least 207 people have been killed since the Trump administration began targeting those it calls "narcoterrorists" in September.

item.title: WATCH: Nonprofit helps storm victims replace lost instruments
item.description: ABC News' Danny New talks to the founder of ReString Appalachia, a nonprofit putting instruments back in the hands of musicians who lost them to devas...

item.title: Israel and Lebanon agree to renew ceasefire if Hezbollah cuts off attacks
item.description: The Israeli and Lebanese governments have agreed to implement a ceasefire, after weeks of deadly fighting between Israel and Hezbollah had imperiled b...

item.title: SPLC asks judge to weigh sanctions against DOJ for sending out unsigned indictment copy
item.description: The Southern Poverty Law Center asked a judge to consider sanctioning federal prosecutors, after the DOJ shared an unsigned and unstamped copy of a su...
